evidence_items.finding: Most recent BMI is 34.0, well above 30 kg/m^2 threshold; sustained BMI >30 across all measurements in past 12 months.
Earlier BMI measurement also documents obesity class 2 with BMI 34.6.
Patient enrolled in supervised structured lifestyle program with dietitian referral in May 2025.
evidence_items.quote: Patient enrolled in structured Weight Watchers program today. Dietitian referral placed. Plan for supervised lifestyle modification x 6+ months before considering pharmacotherapy.

evidence_items.finding: Six-month review documents attendance at supervised program, food logs, and exercise logs meeting supervised diet, physical activity, and behavior modification criteria.
evidence_items.quote: Six-month lifestyle modification review. Patient has attended 21 of 24 scheduled Weight Watchers group sessions. Food logs submitted weekly. Exercise log shows 150+ minutes moderate activity per week.

evidence_items.finding: Ten months of documented structured lifestyle intervention exceeds the six-month minimum.
evidence_items.quote: Patient has completed 10 months of documented structured lifestyle intervention (Weight Watchers attendance records on file).

evidence_items.finding: No personal or family history of MTC or MEN2; patient is not pregnant.
evidence_items.quote: No personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN2 (confirmed with patient today). Not pregnant; last menstrual period 2026-02-06.

Six-month lifestyle modification review. Patient has attended 21 of 24 scheduled Weight Watchers group sessions. Food logs submitted weekly. Exercise log shows 150+ minutes moderate activity per week.
Patient has completed 10 months of documented structured lifestyle intervention (Weight Watchers attendance records on file).
No personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN2 (confirmed with patient today). Not pregnant; last menstrual period 2026-02-06.
